SOUND KITS

TRIPPY DRUM KIT

Elevate your production with 120+ high-quality Trap sounds. Essential kicks, sharp snares, and trippy percussion designed for modern heavy-hitters.

FREE Get Free Kit

Secure Checkout • Licensing & Contracts powered by Beatstars

The Artist

The Architect
of Energy

Alexandros Pilatos is a music producer/audio engineer in Athens, active since 2003. Founder of Purple Sound Studio (2007). His signature sound blends Boom Bap, Lofi, Trap, Dnb, Reggae, Breakbeat, Electronica, and Progressive House.

BeatmakerEngineerProducer

Terms

Licensing Guide

Basic Lease $29.99

MP3 File • 5,000 Copies • 200k Streams • Non-Exclusive

Premium Lease $49.99

WAV + MP3 • 10k Copies • 500k Streams • Non-Exclusive

Exclusive License $150.00+

Full Ownership • Trackouts + WAV • Unlimited • Exclusive

Claims

Usage Policy

Free Beats (Non-Profit)

Evaluate for free. Credit is mandatory (Prod. by Mr. Bonzo). For whitelisting, contact me.

Paid Licenses (Claims)

Purchased? Send YT link + receipt. Claims cleared within 24h.

Contact for Customs

Professional Services

Built for artists, labels, and audiovisual projects.

Music Production
Recording
Mixing & Mastering
Sound Design
Scoring for Media
& more upon request
